define newname::sometype{

}

newname::sometype{
  'instance':
}

Newname::Sometype[instance]

Resource[Newname::Sometype, instance]

Type[Newname::Sometype]

Newname::Sometype{
  name => 'test'
}

class newname::someclass{
  $somevar = 1
}

class newname::otherclass inherits Newname::Someclass{

}

function newname::somefunc{

}

notice $newname::someclass::somevar
